title: Favorites across browsers

posts.author: ketherin (Kristi Etherington)
posts.cookedHtml: I have noticed the views I have set as “My Favorites” on a board are different between browsers. For example, if I set a favorite view on Chrome, the same one does not show up as a favorite on Firefox or vice versa. I have to select it manually as a favorite on the other browser too. This causes problems with consistency and productivity due to different order of favorites and different favorites showing in browsers.
